inputs.name: colorScheme
inputs.description:
Defines the color scheme of the component.
There are 10 predefined schemes.
To use one you can set a number from `"1"` to `"10"`. The `colorScheme` `"1"` will be set by default.

inputs.name: hideCloseButton
inputs.description: Defines whether the MessageStrip renders close button.

inputs.name: hideIcon
inputs.description: Defines whether the MessageStrip will show an icon in the beginning. You can directly provide an icon with the `icon` slot. Otherwise, the default icon for the type will be used. **Note:** If MessageStripDesign.ColorSet1 or MessageStripDesign.ColorSet2 value is set to the design property, default icon will not be presented.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description:
Fired when the close button is pressed either with a
click/tap or by using the Enter or Space key.
